query: INSERT INTO users (email, senha, nome, tipo_de_user, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn) VALUES ('testuser@example.com', '$2b$10$xIVoFfoKeXmv9CLB4saiDO/MvncTveSXtl6oYuFfwfvOljMhFidze', 'Test User', 'user', 'local', NOW(), NOW(), NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE senha=VALUES(senha), nome=VALUES(nome); SELECT * FROM users WHERE email='testuser@example.com';
